body.desc: The main topic or section title, e.g., 'WHAT MAKES US DIFFERENT'.

title.desc: A summary of the company's unique aspects, e.g., 'Where banks stop, FundLok fits'.

subtitle_2.desc: Description of the unique aspect, e.g., 'Fair by design'.

subtitle_3.desc: Further explanation, e.g., 'Repayment is anchored in real revenue capacity, not investor'.

subtitle_5.desc: Description of the unique aspect, e.g., 'Verified over declared'.

subtitle_6.desc: Further explanation, e.g., 'We underwrite on verified operating data, not self-reported '.

subtitle_8.desc: Description of the unique aspect, e.g., 'Transparent to all sides'.

subtitle_9.desc: Further explanation, e.g., 'Every listing shows repayment source, risk grade, data fresh'.
